items.title: Sources: Heat to waive embattled guard Rozier
items.dek: Miami guard Terry Rozier, who has been on leave since October amid a sports gambling probe, will be waived by the Heat on Friday, sources tell ESPN.
items.body: Miami guard Terry Rozier, who has been on leave since October amid a sports gambling probe, will be waived by the Heat on Friday, sources tell ESPN.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Sources: Colts seeking to trade away CB Moore
items.dek: The Colts and Kenny Moore II have agreed to seek a trade to find the veteran cornerback a new team, sources told ESPN.
items.body: The Colts and Kenny Moore II have agreed to seek a trade to find the veteran cornerback a new team, sources told ESPN.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 10-time All-Star Ogwumike returning to Sparks
items.dek: Ten-time WNBA All-Star and 2016 MVP Nneka Ogwumike intends to rejoin the Los Angeles Sparks, her sister Chiney Ogwumike posted on social media on Friday
items.body: Ten-time WNBA All-Star and 2016 MVP Nneka Ogwumike intends to rejoin the Los Angeles Sparks, her sister Chiney Ogwumike posted on social media on Friday
items.author: IriLine Desk
